Mountain Rises.description: Your foundation is as unmoving as the peaks.

Waterside Vow.description: Your dao flows like water, adapting without breaking.

Ancient Tomb Awakened.description: Old karma clings to you; ruins whisper your name.

River Dragon's Gift.description: Fortune follows you as if the river dragon still watches.

Starfall Seclusion.description: You cultivated beneath falling stars; solitude strengthened your qi.

Wandering Immortal's Footsteps.description: You walk paths many have forgotten.
